subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Nembapo ka jishimikila keepi ne kusabaulamo malwañano ajimo.
topics: Ndonda mwa kusabawila malwañano mu jishimikila yo ino;
 Yuka ne kutala pa nkaizhi mukata.
